tasks.title: Implement breach notification SLA tracking
tasks.notes: Added SLA deadline fields (notification_deadline, escalation_triggered, escalation_triggered_at) to breach_incidents table via migration 20260420_0004. Extended BreachIncidentResponse and BreachSlaStatusResponse models with SLA fields. Implemented DB functions: check_breach_sla_status (deadline calculation), list_breach_incidents_by_sla_status (filtering by SLA status), trigger_breach_escalation (admin alert escalation). Added API endpoints: GET /api/compliance/breach-incidents/sla-status (list breaches by deadline urgency), POST /api/compliance/breach-incidents/{id}/escalate (admin-only escalation trigger). Full test coverage with test_breach_sla_tracking, test_breach_escalation_admin_only, test_breach_sla_filter_by_status. All 46 tests passing (43 baseline + 3 new SLA tests). Fixed datetime type handling and audit event function signature issues.

tasks.title: Annual stamp & seal schema and API layer
tasks.notes: Created migration 20260420_0005 adding lawyer_practice_seals and seal_events tables. Added seal CRUD and listing DB functions. Added POST /api/compliance/practice-seal/upload, GET /api/compliance/practice-seal/check, GET /api/compliance/practice-seal/{lawyer_id}, GET /api/compliance/practising-list, POST /api/compliance/practice-seal/{lawyer_id}/verify, GET /api/compliance/practice-seal/{lawyer_id}/audit-trail. Wired malware scanning on seal upload.

tasks.title: Seal trust badge in ranking and search
tasks.notes: Added CPD-compliant seal trust bonus to ranking engine. Appended 'Seal & Stamp {year}' badge to compliant lawyer profiles. Updated frontend search page to render seal icon when badge is present.

tasks.title: Lawyer seal upload UI and encryption at rest
tasks.notes: Added cryptography==42.0.8 dependency. Added encrypt_seal_bytes/decrypt_seal_bytes Fernet helpers and SealEncryptionError in app/security.py. Added SEAL_ENCRYPTION_KEY config in app/settings.py with fallback derivation. Updated upload endpoint to encrypt file bytes before writing to disk. Added frontend lawyer seal upload page at /lawyer/seal. Added Seal nav entry in Navigation.js and dashboard shortcut card. Added .env.example entry for SEAL_ENCRYPTION_KEY.

tasks.title: Admin seal document download endpoint and tests
tasks.notes: Added admin-only GET /api/compliance/practice-seal/{lawyer_id}/document/download endpoint. Decrypts stored Fernet bytes and streams original file to admin with correct content-type and Content-Disposition headers. Logs audit event on every download. Added test_admin_can_download_decrypted_seal_document and test_non_admin_cannot_download_seal_document. Full suite: 23/23 tests passing (compliance 19, ranking 4).

decisions.title: Core matching approach
decisions.context: User selected Option B and requested Nigeria-native trust architecture.
decisions.decision: Use problem-first intake with balanced ranking and explainability.
decisions.impact: Improves onboarding clarity and trust for first-time legal users.

decisions.title: Fairness policy
decisions.context: Need new-lawyer discovery without degrading trust.
decisions.decision: Use quota rotation with adaptive exposure bands and strict eligibility gates.
decisions.impact: Maintains quality while preventing incumbent lock-in.

decisions.title: Tracker continuity
decisions.impact: Faster re-entry and less context loss

decisions.title: Session security model
decisions.context: Legal app needs continuous UX with strong security
decisions.decision: Use short-lived access tokens and rotating refresh tokens
decisions.impact: Seamless conversations with safer session handling

decisions.title: Pilot database strategy
decisions.context: Need speed for first-wave validation with low operational overhead.
decisions.decision: Use SQLite for pilot while preparing PostgreSQL migration readiness before scale-out.
decisions.impact: Faster pilot launch with controlled migration risk.

assumptions: Client identity uses NIN-only for low-friction onboarding.
Lawyer trust layer uses NIN + NBA; BVN supports payout workflows.
Escrow and payment protection workflows are phase-2 implementation.

Extend seal badge to lawyer public profile page.
Automate SEAL_ENCRYPTION_KEY rotation with re-encryption script.
